rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS CAMPBELL VS. KIMBERLY HATHAWAY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Request For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Pltf'S Mtn To Compel Deft'S Responses To Req For Admissions Set One And Req For Production Of Docs Set One
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 12, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs JOHN HOFFMAN AND KIMBERLY HATHAWAY-SIEGEL's Request For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Request For Admissions Set One And Request For Production Of Documents Set One. Deny, CCP 1008 not met. = (501/REQ)
